name: Golden Vegetable Noodle Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup whole wheat pasta, broken into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, steam-fry the onion, celery, and garlic until tender.
2. Add water, split peas, turmeric, and bay leaf to the pot.
3. Simmer for 1 hour.
4. Add the remaining ingredients: frozen peas, carrot, parsley, nutritional yeast flakes, salt (if using), soy sauce, and balsamic vinegar.
5. Cook until the noodles are soft and the carrots are tender. Adjust seasoning with pepper if desired.
Per serving: 159 cal; 9g prot; 29g carb; 0g fat.
